---
title: "Course Final Grade Calculator"
format: 
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: false
engine: knitr
filters:
  - webr
---

## How to Calculate Your Grade

Use the interactive code block below to calculate your final grade. 

**IMPORTANT INSTRUCTIONS:**
* Enter the **raw points** you received on each assignment, **NOT** the percentage.
* You must also enter the **maximum possible points** for each assignment.
* If an assignment is not yet graded, you can enter a projected score to see how it will affect your final average.
* The script will automatically drop your lowest Online Quiz score and your lowest Recitation & R-Lab score before calculating the final average. There is no extra credit.

---

### Grade Calculator

Change the numbers in the "STEP 1" section to reflect your actual scores, then run the code block to see your final grade.

```{webr-r}
#| label: grade-calculator

# =====================================================================
# STEP 1: ENTER YOUR SCORES HERE (Points Earned and Maximum Points)
# =====================================================================

# Online Quizzes (Your lowest score will be automatically dropped)
quizzes_earned <- c(100,100,100,100,100,100,100,100,100,100,100)  # Each R Lab out of 100 points
quizzes_max    <- rep(100, times = 11)

# Recitation & R-lab (Your lowest score will be automatically dropped from this list)
rlabs_earned   <- c(100,100,100,100,100,100,100,100,100,100,100,100) # Each R Lab is out of 100 points
rlabs_max      <- rep(100, times = 12 )

# MyLab HW (Give yourself full credit for each HW you got a 90% or above on; lowest automatically dropped from this list).  If you did not get >= 90% on a HW give yourself a 0 for that HW.
mylab_earned   <- c(47, 58, 48, 35, 72, 45, 15, 36, 32, 54, 25, 64)
mylab_max      <- c(47, 58, 48, 35, 72, 45, 15, 36, 32, 54, 25, 64) #updated 4/27 by S.B.

# Exam I
exam1_earned   <- 82
exam1_max      <- 100

# Exam II
exam2_earned   <- 88
exam2_max      <- 100

# Final Exam
final_earned   <- 180
final_max      <- 200


# =====================================================================
# STEP 2: DO NOT EDIT BELOW THIS LINE (Calculation Logic)
# =====================================================================

# Helper function to calculate percentage and drop lowest if needed
calc_category <- function(earned, max_pts, drop_lowest = FALSE) {
  if (length(earned) == 0) return(0)
  
  if (drop_lowest && length(earned) > 1) {
    # Find the index of the lowest percentage
    lowest_idx <- which.min(earned / max_pts)
    # Remove the lowest score
    earned <- earned[-lowest_idx]
    max_pts <- max_pts[-lowest_idx]
  }
  
  # Return the category percentage (out of 100)
  return((sum(earned) / sum(max_pts)) * 100)
}

# Calculate percentages for each category
quiz_pct  <- calc_category(quizzes_earned, quizzes_max, drop_lowest = TRUE)
rlab_pct  <- calc_category(rlabs_earned, rlabs_max, drop_lowest = TRUE)
mylab_pct <- calc_category(mylab_earned, mylab_max, drop_lowest = FALSE)
exam1_pct <- calc_category(exam1_earned, exam1_max, drop_lowest = FALSE)
exam2_pct <- calc_category(exam2_earned, exam2_max, drop_lowest = FALSE)
final_pct <- calc_category(final_earned, final_max, drop_lowest = FALSE)

# Apply syllabus weights
final_average <- (quiz_pct * 0.15) + 
                 (rlab_pct * 0.10) + 
                 (mylab_pct * 0.10) + 
                 (exam1_pct * 0.20) + 
                 (exam2_pct * 0.20) + 
                 (final_pct * 0.25)

# Determine the Letter Grade
get_letter_grade <- function(score) {
  if (score >= 93) return("A")
  if (score >= 90) return("A-")
  if (score >= 87) return("B+")
  if (score >= 83) return("B")
  if (score >= 80) return("B-")
  if (score >= 77) return("C+")
  if (score >= 73) return("C")
  if (score >= 70) return("C-")
  if (score >= 67) return("D+")
  if (score >= 60) return("D")
  return("F")
}

letter_grade <- get_letter_grade(final_average)

# =====================================================================
# STEP 3: RESULTS
# =====================================================================

cat("--------------------------------------------------\n")
cat("YOUR GRADE REPORT\n")
cat("--------------------------------------------------\n")
cat(sprintf("Quizzes (Lowest Dropped):  %.2f%%\n", quiz_pct))
cat(sprintf("R-Labs (Lowest Dropped):   %.2f%%\n", rlab_pct))
cat(sprintf("MyLab HW:                  %.2f%%\n", mylab_pct))
cat(sprintf("Exam I:                    %.2f%%\n", exam1_pct))
cat(sprintf("Exam II:                   %.2f%%\n", exam2_pct))
cat(sprintf("Final Exam:                %.2f%%\n", final_pct))
cat("--------------------------------------------------\n")
cat(sprintf("FINAL COURSE AVERAGE:      %.2f%%\n", final_average))
cat(sprintf("FINAL LETTER GRADE:        %s\n", letter_grade))
cat("--------------------------------------------------\n")
```
